hero.heading: CoreLab Analytics
hero.description: An interactive platform that integrates Automated Statistical Analysis to convert raw research data into immediate visual insights — replacing static papers with a dynamic, real-time research dashboard.

sections.title: Background of the Study
paragraphs: At STI College Malolos, computer laboratories are central to IT training — the environment where lecture material translates into applied skills.
Local work shows that strong ICT integration is tied to better student outcomes, while international studies point to the way access to electronic facilities strengthens student competence.

highlights.title: Lab as Classroom
highlights.text: Hands-on hours where theory becomes practice.

highlights.title: STI Malolos Context
highlights.text: Grounded in local IT student experience.

sections.title: The Central Question
sections.centralQuestion: Does computer laboratory usage — measured through attended lab hours per week and the percentage of hands-on activity — correspond to changes in academic performance between the Preliminary and Midterm grading periods?
subQuestions: How many hours per week do students spend in the computer laboratory?
What percentage of lab time is dedicated to hands-on activity?
Is there a measurable change between Prelim and Midterm grades?
Does lab usage predict the direction of that change?

items.title: Measure Lab Exposure
items.text: Quantify weekly attended laboratory hours per student.

items.title: Capture Hands-On Ratio
items.text: Determine percentage of active vs. passive lab time.

items.title: Model the Relationship
items.text: Use regression to test predictive strength.

items.label: H₀
items.text: There is no significant relationship between computer laboratory usage and academic performance change between grading periods.

items.label: H₁
items.text: Higher lab hours and a greater hands-on ratio are positively associated with improved performance from Prelim to Midterm.

finale.title: Ready to explore the data?
finale.description: Step into the live tool to take the survey, or jump directly to the visualization dashboard.
